loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing PCC Panel 1 aggregate data; 2 of 8 supply-side members (Solar Incomers, Transformers) are offline (has_data=N) and render as blanks.

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing live power states across all LT-PCC feeders; incomers are dark (no data) and render as blank rows per roster policy.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: AI narrative is generated from panel rollup data; some panel members (GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7) have no live data and are excluded from the narrative.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power (active_power_total_kw) — contracted capacity is unknown, so load utilization % and breakdown are omitted.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend and peak; per-member breakdown is rendered by the panel-aggregate renderer from member meters (GIC-01-N3, GIC-01-N4, GIC-01-N5, GIC-01-N8, GIC-02-N2, GIC-02-N5 have data; GIC-01-N9, GIC-02-N1, GIC-15-N10, GIC-15-N11, GIC-02-N6, GIC-02-N7 are dark).

loop1.title: Quick Stats
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate stats from 6 live feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blank their slots.
